login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your letter journey
login.registerSubtitle: Sign up to start your letter journey
login.checkEmailDescription: We sent you a confirmation link. Please check your inbox to verify your account.
login.footer: A research project on AI-driven interactive storytelling

game.title: Begin your narrative experience

intro.studyDesc1: This study explores how people write and manage narrative conversations in digital format. To this end, an experimental letter exchange platform called Imbustai will be used, designed to simulate a written conversation between the participant and a narrative interlocutor.
intro.studyDesc2: During the study you will play a 30-year-old person who receives letters from an old school friend who claims to have found your contact and wishes to reconnect. You will be asked to reply to the letters as you would normally in a letter exchange, freely choosing the tone and level of involvement.
intro.studyDesc3: There are no right or wrong answers: the goal is to observe how people write and interpret a narrative situation through language.
intro.dataDesc: Participants' responses will be collected and used exclusively for research purposes within a degree thesis. Texts may be analyzed using qualitative and semantic analysis tools, in order to study how people interpret and describe narrative situations.
intro.anonymityDesc: All collected data will be treated anonymously. No real names or information that could identify participants will be used in research materials.
intro.voluntaryDesc: Participation in the study is completely voluntary. You may stop participating at any time, without any consequences.
intro.consentDesc: By participating in the study, you declare that you have read and understood the information above and consent to the use of your responses, in anonymous form, for research purposes.
intro.timingDesc: For the process to work perfectly, we ask you to reply within {time} of receiving each letter. If it's late (after 11 PM), you can answer the following morning.

game.waitingDescription: Your letter is on its way. A reply will arrive shortly...
game.gameCompleteDescription: Thank you for completing this letter exchange.
game.feedbackTitle: How did it go? Write anything you'd like to say but didn't get the chance to, or any other thoughts that came to mind.
game.feedbackThankYouDescription: Your contribution is valuable for our research.

questionnaire.title: Before finishing, please answer these questions:
questionnaire.q1: I tried to understand the situation before making a judgment
questionnaire.q2: I found it difficult to take a clear position
questionnaire.q3: I perceived that actions depended mainly on individual choices
questionnaire.q4: I perceived that actions were influenced by context and social expectations
questionnaire.q5: I perceived the interlocutor as free to choose what to do
questionnaire.q6: I perceived the interlocutor as somehow constrained by the situation
questionnaire.q7: I felt involved in the interlocutor's situation
questionnaire.q8: I maintained a certain emotional distance
questionnaire.q9: I perceived a clear boundary between what I consider acceptable and unacceptable
questionnaire.q10: I tried to mediate between my point of view and that of the interlocutor
questionnaire.q11: I tried to argue and explain my point of view in my responses

clusterAnalysis.subtitle: K-means clustering on the 10 main indices with 2D PCA projection

profileDistribution.title: Profile Distribution
profileDistribution.subtitle: Rule-based participant profile labels with transparent scoring criteria
profileDistribution.label: Profile

descriptions.rigid-normative: High moral rigidity, individual responsibility, and positive boundary orientation
descriptions.contextual-mediating: High mediation, social responsibility, and negative boundary orientation
descriptions.ambivalent: Difficulty taking positions, balanced responsibility and agency
descriptions.empathic-interventionist: High emotional involvement and argumentation, low distance
descriptions.unclassified: Does not match any dominant profile pattern

usageSegmentation.title: Usage Segmentation
usageSegmentation.subtitle: Behavioral patterns derived from session metadata

correlationMatrix.subtitle: Pearson correlations across questionnaire items and indices

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure application behavior

delayedResponses.title: Delayed Responses
delayedResponses.description: When enabled, AI responses will be delayed by a random amount of time within the configured range. Users will see a “letter sent” message until the response becomes visible.

settings.delayInfo: Responses will be delayed between {min} and {max} minutes. If the computed time falls after 11 PM, the response will be scheduled for 8 AM the next day.

validation.minAtLeastOne: Minimum response time must be at least 1 minute
validation.maxGreaterThanMin: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
